title: rubus argenteus subsp. racemosus
intro: Rubus argenteus subsp. racemosus, also known as the silver raspberry, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus argenteus subsp. racemosus include its potential to help manage conditions such as high blood pressure and diabetes, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
